method.calibrator: two-logit full multinomial calibration relative to away
method.selection: earliest two completed outer seasons fit; penultimate season selection; last complete season untouched holdout

kl_projection_audit.objective: minimum KL projection to learned cross-class 1X2 margins
kl_projection_audit.constraint_form: three 1X2 class margins plus probability conservation

challenge_gate_fail_reasons: holdout accuracy gain below 1 percentage point
